claims.statement: On this machine and the recorded one-million-cell level 1 targeted-upsert workload, the single-pass transform coalesced 5199505 output fragments into 134 batches with a 262144-byte peak owned buffer; median transform time was 767186 us and median process peak working set was 8.80078 MB.

Against the same-machine, same-protocol level 1 profile in the recorded raw-copy bundle, median total editor, mutation and transform time decreased by 41.33%, 47.07% and 52.11% respectively; process timing remains system-sensitive and this is not a cross-machine guarantee.
For the recorded one-million-cell level 6 upsert, median package-writer time was 933636 us versus 865366 us for the transform, making DEFLATE package output the larger measured stage in that profile.

For the recorded five-million-cell level 1 upsert, 183697902 logical worksheet bytes were rewritten while the batching buffer stayed at 262144 bytes and median process peak working set was 8.80859 MB; median total and transform time were 8494 ms and 5855255 us.

The runner verified plan byte accounting and exact compressed payload equality for every raw-copy entry in all warm-up and measured outputs; the median representative from each profile opened with openpyxl. Microsoft Office was not run.
